message:
test(mouse-dispatch): add 8 integration tests for status bar + scroll regression

Integration tests verifying full app-level mouse dispatch chain:
- Status bar help/debug/perf toggle via hit grid click (3 tests)
- Scroll wheel tab cycling (forward and back) (2 tests)
- Double-click toggle returns to original state (1 test)
- Mouse capture toggle via status bar click (1 test)
- Dispatch priority: overlay close beats status bar (1 test)

All tests use Frame::with_hit_grid for real hit testing.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
